sol_system.name: Sol System
sol_system.introduction: The home star system of humanity.

earth.name: Earth
earth.introduction: Third planet of the Sol System.
earth.environment: Nitrogen–oxygen atmosphere with liquid water oceans.

2031.economy: Expanded high-tech and orbital logistics hub

system_oxyde.name: Oxyde System
system_oxyde.introduction: Metal-rich stellar system orbiting a bright red dwarf star.
system_oxyde.history: During the Planetary Period multiple corporations established large industrial infrastructure in the system including orbital shipyards, metallurgical processing stations and asteroid extraction networks. Corporate tensions escalated into a mercenary and corporate war that destroyed much of the orbital infrastructure around Patina. After the collapse of corporate authority, Rust Sector forces stabilized the system and Patina declared independence from the Gold Sector.

planet_patina.name: Patina
planet_patina.introduction: Industrial production world in the Oxyde System.
planet_patina.environment: Originally selected as a terraforming world by the Terran Biome Diversity Project. Large areas were partially terraformed before heavy industrialization redirected the planet’s development.
planet_patina.biosphere: Terraforming introduced early Terran ecological systems but large-scale industrial development prevented the biosphere from reaching full maturity.
planet_patina.economy: Heavy metallurgical production, orbital ship construction and large-scale industrial manufacturing.
planet_patina.history: Patina began as a BDP terraforming world seeded by early ark missions. Rapid advances in interstellar propulsion allowed corporate expansion fleets to reach the Oxyde system before terraforming was complete. The partially terraformed world was converted into a heavy industrial production center. Large orbital shipyards and metallurgical complexes were constructed during the Planetary Period. Much of this infrastructure was destroyed during the later corporate and mercenary war, producing the Patina Orbital Graveyard.

orbital_sector_patina_graveyard.name: Patina Orbital Graveyard
orbital_sector_patina_graveyard.introduction: Large orbital debris region surrounding Patina.
orbital_sector_patina_graveyard.history: The graveyard formed during the corporate and mercenary war of the late Planetary Period when large portions of Patina's orbital infrastructure were destroyed.
orbital_sector_patina_graveyard.formation: Destroyed shipyards, fleet wreckage, and abandoned logistics infrastructure accumulated in several orbital bands around the planet.
orbital_sector_patina_graveyard.traffic_profile: Heavy salvage and scrap traffic operates throughout the debris field.
orbital_sector_patina_graveyard.hazards: High debris density and unstable drifting industrial structures.

patina_wreckage_belt_7.name: Patina Wreckage Belt 7
patina_wreckage_belt_7.introduction: Orbital debris belt formed during the Oxyde corporate war.
patina_wreckage_belt_7.history: Formed after multiple carrier formations were destroyed during orbital battles.
patina_wreckage_belt_7.formation: Accumulation of carrier hulls, container freighters and industrial structures destroyed during the war.
patina_wreckage_belt_7.traffic_profile: Heavy salvage traffic by Rust Sector scrap fleets.
patina_wreckage_belt_7.hazards: High debris density and unstable rotating structures.
